name: X Social Distiller
description: Turn source material into useful public X posts/replies: distill lessons, search live X chatter, rank opportunities, queue drafts, and optionally post through the canonical x skill with verification.
author: home23
triggers: find a tweet to respond to from this article
post a useful quick hit from this topic
compositionHints: Use distill first to convert source material into public lesson cards, then search or queue to find X candidates and drafts.
Use postQueued only for a selected queue item; it posts through the canonical x skill and verifies read-back before returning success.
For generated image posts, generate_image first, then postQueued with generatedImage:'latest', requireMedia:true, requireGeneratedImage:true.
